_README.purpose: Competitor-to-Majestic glove cross-reference data for the comparison tool. A rep enters a competitor part number; the tool returns the closest Majestic products.
_README.structure: Two normalized tables. 'majestic' is the pool of Majestic products (deduplicated, full specs). 'competitors' is keyed by competitor part number; each carries its own specs plus override fields for the curated match and copy.
_README.matching_logic: Match #1 comes from 'overrideBestMatch' (a human-verified match). Matches #2 and #3 are generated at runtime by the tool's weighted scoring against the 'majestic' pool, excluding #1. No exhaustive pairwise table is stored.

override_fields.overrideBestMatch: Majestic part number to pin as the #1 match. Remove to let the algorithm pick #1 too.
override_fields.overrideSummary: Human-written one-line summary for the #1 match. Auto-generated when absent.
override_fields.overrideDescription: Human-written longer 'why Majestic' paragraph for the #1 match. Auto-generated when absent.

_README.field_notes: All part numbers are strings. ratings = ANSI/ISEA 105 {cut e.g. 'A4', abrasion 1-6, puncture 1-5}. Competitor product names are not present in the source (brand + part only).

4214.overrideDescription: Compared to the 4214, Majestic’s 35-1587 delivers higher cut protection (A6 vs A3), with added features like touchscreen-compatible fingertips so workers can perform all their daily tasks without removing their gloves.

4895.overrideSummary: Majestic’s 21262HO offers higher cut protection with a high visibility design to help workers stay seen in low light conditions.
4895.overrideDescription: Compared to the 4895, Majestic’s 21262HO delivers higher cut protection (A2), stronger puncture resistance, with added features, such as a high-visibility design that helps keep workers visible in low-light conditions.

4265.overrideDescription: Compared to the 4265, Majestic’s 21262HO delivers higher cut protection (A2), stronger puncture resistance, with added features, such as a high-visibility design that helps keep workers visible in low-light conditions.

4897.overrideSummary: Majestic’s 35-7467 offers higher cut protection with a dotted foam nitrile palm to help workers stay comfortable and protected.
4897.overrideDescription: Compared to the 4897, Majestic’s 35-7467 delivers higher cut protection (A4), better abrasion durability, stronger puncture resistance.

CRBN3.overrideSummary: Majestic’s 35-7465 features touchscreen compatibility and Sanitized® by Actifresh treatment, helping workers stay comfortable, connected and protected on the job.
CRBN3.overrideDescription: Compared to the CRBN3, Majestic’s 35-7465 delivers equal cut level (A4), better abrasion durability, stronger puncture resistance, with added features, like a sanitized by Actifresh treatment, to help keep the gloves cleaner for longer, extending the lifespan of each pair of gloves.
